html:
The Yellow Gem is an item used to craft Ancient items. It is required in two main crafting recipes; the Magiluminescence and Star Caller's Staff.

The Magiluminescence is an amulet that emits light, increases movement speed, and provides a Sanity boost when worn.

The Star Caller's Staff summons a Dwarf Star that emits light and heat. It can also be used for Cooking Food.

Yellow Gems are obtained by mining Ancient Statues, breaking Relics, destroying Broken Clockworks, and opening Ornate Chests.

Downloadable Content

In the Reign of Giants DLC, Yellow Gems have a 0.01% chance to be dropped by Tumbleweeds, making them renewable.

In the Hamlet DLC, there is a very low chance for Yellow Gems to drop by Hammering A Smashing Pot.

Gallery

  • Medal yellow emoji from official Klei Discord server.
  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.

History

Game Update Version Description
Don't Starve Hungry For Your Hunger None Ewecus has been added to the game.
Hamlet The Aporkalypse! 298452 Fixed a bug due to which the yellow gem became invisible when placed on a shelf.

"yellowgem"
“This gem is yellow.”
–Wilson
“It sparkles.”
–Willow
“Pretty rock.”
–Wolfgang
“It reminds me of my mother.”
–Wendy
“IT IS RATHER HEAVY.”
–WX-78
“Perhaps it is similar to Citrine.”
–Wickerbottom
“I can see the stars in it.”
–Woodie
“I can feel the magic in this.”
–Maxwell
“A study in proper proportion of sines of angles of incidence and refraction.”
–Wagstaff
“A yellöw beaut.”
–Wigfrid
“Yellow-bellied gem.”
–Webber
“It's got a nice energy.”
–Walani
“I miss lemons...”
–Warly
“A gem th'color o'me teeth!”
–Woodlegs
“WHAT LIGHT THROUGH YONDER GEM BREAKETH?”
–Wilba
“Bright light shiny”
–Wormwood
“Nice and light.”
–Wheeler
“I like gems best before they're cut.”
–Winona
“From lava floes bellow this glimmering yellow.”
–Wortox
“There sunshine inside it.”
–Wurt
“Is it supposed to feel warm?”
–Walter
“It won't do much good by itself.”
–Wanda
The Yellow Gem is an item used to craft Ancient items. It is required in two main crafting recipes; the Magiluminescence and Star Caller's Staff.
The Magiluminescence is an amulet that emits light, increases movement speed, and provides a Sanity boost when worn.
The Star Caller's Staff summons a Dwarf Star that emits light and heat. It can also be used for Cooking Food.
Yellow Gems are obtained by mining Ancient Statues, breaking Relics, destroying Broken Clockworks, and opening Ornate Chests.

In the Reign of Giants DLC, Yellow Gems have a 0.01% chance to be dropped by Tumbleweeds, making them renewable.
In the Hamlet DLC, there is a very low chance for Yellow Gems to drop by Hammering A Smashing Pot.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Ngọc Vàng là một vật phẩm dùng để chế tạo các Vật phẩm Cổ xưa. Nó được yêu cầu trong hai công thức chế tạo chính; Magiluminescent và Gậy Gọi Sao.

It is required in two main crafting recipes; the [[Magiluminescence]] and [[Star Caller's Staff]]. The [[Magiluminescence]] is an amulet that emits light, increases movement speed, and provides a Sanity boost when worn. The [[Star Caller's Staff]] summons a Dwarf Star that emits light and heat. It can also be used for [[Cooking]] [[Food]].
